title: MediaSessionService.setCustomMediaKeyDispatcher 零权限 system_server 任意类实例化
pattern: Missing permission check + arbitrary class instantiation
notes: ISessionManager.setCustomMediaKeyDispatcher(String className) TRANSACTION_CODE=25 has ZERO permission check. It calls Class.forName(className).getDeclaredConstructor(Context.class).newInstance(mContext) in system_server (pid 13078). FULLY VERIFIED ON DEVICE: (1) service call media_session 25 s16 'com.android.server.SystemServer' -> Class.forName succeeds, getDeclaredConstructor fails (no Context ctor). (2) service call media_session 25 s16 'android.content.ContextWrapper' -> CONSTRUCTOR EXECUTES SUCCESSFULLY in system_server, then ClassCastException after. Logcat confirms: 'java.lang.ClassCastException at MediaSessionService.instantiateCustomDispatcher'. This proves arbitrary class instantiation works. Need gadget class with Context ctor + dangerous side effects. setCustomMediaSessionPolicyProvider (TRANSACTION_CODE=26) is identical. From untrusted_app: raw Binder.transact() bypasses hidden API enforcement.
